title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security. After opening Security, choose Reset Password, enter the current password, and confirm the new password. If a user does not remember the current password, they should use the Forgot Password link on the sign-in page.

title: Account Deletion
content: Users can delete their account from Account Settings > Privacy > Delete Account. Account deletion is permanent after a 14 day recovery window. During the recovery window, users can sign in again to cancel deletion.

title: Two-Factor Authentication
content: Two-factor authentication can be enabled from Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. Users may choose an authenticator app or SMS verification. Backup codes should be downloaded and stored safely after setup.

title: Change Email Address
content: Users can change their email address from Account Settings > Profile > Email Address. The new email address must be verified before it becomes the primary login address.

title: Download Account Data
content: Users can download their account data from Account Settings > Privacy > Export Data. The export file is usually prepared within 24 hours and is sent to the verified email address on the account.
